name: Goutham Kanagarasu
title: Software Engineer
summary: Software Engineer with 2+ years of experience building scalable full-stack and AI-powered applications across web and mobile platforms. Strong expertise in designing backend services, developing modern user interfaces, and integrating LLMs and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems for real-time solutions. Proven track record of reducing manual effort by 90% through automation and delivering high-performance, user-centric applications.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built and deployed full-stack enterprise applications using Java, Spring Boot, and Angular, contributing to scalable and maintainable systems.
Designed and automated a document processing pipeline using Python, Node.js, Streamlit, and Robot Framework, reducing manual effort by 90% and processing time from hours to minutes.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins to enable automated testing and seamless deployment across internal environments.
Debugged and optimized C++ Qt modules in a diagnostic system, improving reliability by 25% and reducing production incidents.
Developed React Native UI components for cloud onboarding and data visualization, improving cross-platform user experience.
Built a Technology Radar using React, Vite, and TailwindCSS to visualize and compare engineering trends with dynamic data rendering.

achievements: Received Best Tyro Award at Bosch Global Software Technologies for outstanding independent project contributions

projects.name: AI-Powered MCQ Generator (RAG System)
projects.description: Full-stack AI application for context-aware MCQ generation from PDFs.
bullets: Built a full-stack AI application using React, FastAPI, MySQL, and Gemini to generate context-aware MCQs from PDFs.
Implemented Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) using Pinecone and HuggingFace embeddings for accurate content retrieval.
Designed scalable APIs for document upload, vector search, and LLM-based response generation and reduced manual quiz creation effort by 70%, generating 100+ MCQs from 10+ documents.
Deployed using cost-efficient cloud solutions for optimized LLMOps.

projects.name: Mini Cloud Security Posture Management (CSPM)
projects.description: Full-stack cloud security platform for scanning AWS resources for misconfigurations.
bullets: Developed a full-stack cloud security platform using React and FastAPI to scan AWS resources (EC2, S3) for misconfigurations.
Integrated AWS SDK (Boto3) to analyze real-time cloud configurations and detect security risks (public exposure, encryption, logging).
Designed risk classification engine (High/Medium/Low) with policy-based evaluation for compliance checks.
Built an interactive dashboard with filtering, search, and metadata inspection for security insights visualization.

projects.name: Expense Tracker
projects.description: Full-stack expense tracking application with secure authentication.
bullets: Built a resilient full-stack application using React, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL with JWT-based authentication.
Implemented idempotent APIs using client-generated UUIDs to ensure safe retries and prevent duplicate transactions.
Designed secure authentication using Argon2 hashing and token-based session management and ensured timezone consistency (IST) at database level to maintain accurate financial records.
Developed responsive UI with real-time updates, filtering, and analytics for expense tracking.
